website.title: NothingHere — One key press. Clean screen. Zero evidence.
website.description: NothingHere is a macOS utility that hides all windows, mutes sound, and opens a cover file or app with a single key press.
website.text_excerpt: NothingHere — One key press. Clean screen. Zero evidence. NothingHere Features How It Works Guard Mode Whitelist Story Download NothingHere One key press. Clean screen. Zero evidence. Download for macOS View on GitHub macOS 15.0+ | Free & Open Source | ~5.8 MB Three actions. One key. NothingHere performs three critical actions simultaneously the moment you press your hotkey. Hide All Windows Instantly minimizes or hides every visible window across all applications. Your screen goes clean in milliseconds. Mute Sound Mutes all system audio instantly. Music, podcasts, videos — everything goes silent simultaneously. Cover Action Opens a cover file or launches an app — a spreadsheet, Slack, Xcode, or anything that looks like real work. How it works Set up once, use forever. Three simple steps to total screen privacy. 1 Set your hotkey Choose any key combination. ⌘ ⇧ H or whatever feels natural. 2 Configure your cover Pick a file or an app — a spreadsheet, Slack, Xcode, anything that looks like legitimate work. 3 Press and relax One key press hides everything, mutes sound, and opens your cover. Done in milliseconds. New in v1.1 Guard Mode Guard Mode lives in your menu bar. When armed, NothingHere watches for any key press and is ready to act instantly. Toggle between armed and disarmed states with a single click. The menu bar icon changes to reflect the current state — so you always know if you're protected. Armed Watching for any key press Guard disabled New in v1.2 App Whitelist Some apps should stay visible when panic triggers. Add them to the whitelist and they won't be hidden — perfect for keeping your music player, terminal, or messaging app running in plain sight. A macOS client, natively built to review code changes of your team. v4.5.1 | macOS 14.0+ macOS native Get the most of your Mac, written entirely in Swift with latest Apple technologies. Make Pulldog your own, tailored to your needs. Save time Developers spend a significant amount of their time on code reviews; we believe this experience can be improved and made frictionless. Multiple accounts One software to rule them all, one software to find them, One software to bring them all and in the darkness approved them. As with your mailbox, you can add as many Github or Gitlab account as you need and monitor everything from Pulldog. If your team does not work with a monorepository that's not an issue anymore. Smart queries Remember previous Apple mail "smart folders" feature ? With Pulldog we bring it back, create your own smart queries to keep the count!
